headline: 25-year-old travel platform shuts down forever, cancels trips
summary: When the first online travel booking platform popped up in the mid-1990s, what at the time was seen as a niche way to book plane tickets ended up revolutionizing the industry to such a point that only travel agencies serving very niche audiences now manage to survive in the modern market.
